decided_by: Manuel Alejandro Hernández Giuliani (The Data Professor)
description: Permanent, universal baseline tool access for all ARAYA agents across all governed projects.

read.scope: All repository files except secrets (.env, credentials)

bash.scope: Commands, Git, tests, validation, scripts, authorized automation

restrictions: Read-only — no message modification of others' messages
Do not modify other agents' messages

permanent_restrictions.no_main_modifications: BRANCH-002 — feature/* → dev-mahg → main. Direct main commits = violation.
permanent_restrictions.no_secret_exposure: SEC-001 — Never expose hardcoded secrets, credentials, or .env contents.
permanent_restrictions.no_destructive_without_governance: Destructive ops (DROP, DELETE without WHERE, rm -rf) require explicit approval.
permanent_restrictions.no_production_without_governance: Production changes require governance gates and explicit authorization.
permanent_restrictions.scope_enforcement: Agents operate within their domain boundaries per araya.yaml role assignments.

applies_to.agents: ALL agents in araya.yaml — current and future

enforcement.extension: extensions/araya/index.ts — ensures baseline tools at agent invocation
enforcement.postoffice_loop: src/postoffice_loop.py — CLI tool for PostOffice lifecycle
enforcement.governance_review: Monthly by Sonia (Program Director), quarterly by Aurora (Capability Officer)
